title: A solid ring (annulus) with three precisely cut channels at 120° intervals. The ring represents the complete, self-contained Precept definition; the channels are the only structural paths through it (CreateInstance, Fire, Inspect). Invalid states cannot exist because there is no structural opening for them.
conceptualBridge: The governed ring means valid operations are structural openings because anything not cut into the contract simply has no path.
decision: Rejected on rescore: avg 3.69 below threshold — the three-channel ring concept requires knowing Precept's three operations to decode; the ring-with-notches silhouette is used by several other developer tools (Kubernetes, etc.) and doesn't read as specifically Precept; uniqueness and conceptual bridge both score below 4.
